raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding dispute XXXX. It had an estimated resolution date of several weeks ago, and then it changed to today XX/XX/2024 yet it still has not resolved. I even submitted emails from the merchant where they acknowledge my items were lost and I am owed a refund, and I submitted XXXX tracking which stated that merchandise was missing from the packages the merchant sent me. I am still owed my money on this transaction and the chargeback remaining pending forever is insulting to my third party impartial XXXX evidence and the merchant 's own admission. I can only think that American Express is discriminating against me because I am XXXX and XXXX is a XXXX XXXX american comapny.
